name: Hero Party Tackling the Demon World When Everything is on a Totally Different Scale 18: Milk Vendor Cow Girl
description:
So...uh...enjoy guys! If you guys ask why I suddenly skip up from 1 to 18, cause...someone request me to do this quick so... don't worry, I'll still try to do from 2 to 17, no biggie. And since in this original manga, MAG change into MP so i'll change just that.

Art from teradaochiko

Original manga( translated): https://e-hentai.org/s/67c7ef0be2/3291293-13
creator: Alf007
